ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the transaction location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the transaction location */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the transaction occurred */,
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identifier associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., online, offline, ATM, etc.) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the transaction (e.g., credit card, cash, etc.) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Current status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, failed, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_status FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_status") REFERENCES transaction_status ("status_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_identifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("identifier_id") REFERENCES identifiers ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_transaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_type") REFERENCES transaction_types ("type_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_payment_method FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method") REFERENCES payment_methods ("method_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "identifiers" (
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identifier */,
  "identifier_code" TEXT /* Code of the identifier */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the identifier */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Name of the owner associated with the identifier */,
  "owner_email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner associated with the identifier */,
  "owner_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner associated with the identifier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("identifier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction history entry */,
  "identifier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the identifier associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_identifier_id FOREIGN KEY ("identifier_id") REFERENCES identifiers ("identifier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transaction_history_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction type */,
  "type_code" TEXT /* Code of the transaction type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_code" TEXT /* Code of the payment method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction status */,
  "status_code" TEXT /* Code of the transaction status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log entry */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the transaction associated with the security event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event (e.g., login attempt, transaction initiation, etc.) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the security event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the security event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)
